name: @minsky/observer-heals
description: Automated heal helpers for catalogued failure modes (M1.13 phase 1). Each helper: detect() / apply() / verify() against a fixture-seam'd host. Pattern: SRE on-call automation (Beyer 2016 Ch. 6 + Ch. 11). User-story: user-stories/007-agent-self-heals-catalogued-failures.md.
